title: Tapas Platter with Grilled Spanish Shrimp
description: A Spanish-inspired tapas platter featuring grilled shrimp, delicate olives, and platter of fresh plums. Perfect for a light and refreshing snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Spanish Shrimp
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

ingredients.name: Fresh Plums
ingredients.notes: Any variety, but Spanish or Italian plums work best

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the shrimp to the marinade and mix to coat. Let it marinate for at least 15 minutes.
4. Remove the shrimp from the marinade and place them on the grill. Cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the baguette slices on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Arrange the toasted bread, olives, and plum slices on a platter.
7. Once the shrimp are cooked, place them on top of the platter.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
9. Serve the tapas platter with the grilled shrimp as the main attraction.
10. Enjoy your delicious and easy tapas platter!
